gist.headline: Extra, Extra!
gist.blurb: The daily news has been printed and pinned to the front page.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README's latest news section.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page up to date with the latest project announcements.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a paperboy or pinning a news bulletin to a wooden board. A cute pixel art robot printing a tiny newspaper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh newspaper to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
